name_cn:
Twilly|Maya Jungle Orpheus Magic
Designer: Alice Shirley
04 Color, Sky Blue / Beige / Cinnabar Red
·
The pastel blue Maya Jungle is softer than blue and gray.
·
Orpheus is a figure from Greek mythology, most famous for his masterful lyre playing. His music could enchant the wild animals of the forest; even streams would stop, and trees would lean in to listen to his beautiful song.
The magical legend of Orpheus is interpreted on this small Twilly, with Orpheus playing moving music in the jungle. Deer, lions, bears, and horses are moved by the sound, attracted by the touching melody.
